$schema-note: Machine mirror of templates/mdFiles/CODE-STYLE.md (Uncle Bob workspace philosophy). Judgment-enforced unless a project adds Biome/AST channels. Keep in step with the prose guide.
gate: project-defined (prefer: biome ci && tsc --noEmit && tests && build)

channels.judgment: Review / deslop / coach skills and human review. No deterministic detector by default.

rules.statement: Reuse and extend before creating; promote to shared only on a real second consumer.
SSOT / KISS / YAGNI / DRY: one source of truth; simplest thing that works; no premature features; no copy-paste logic.
Functions are small, do one thing, stay at one abstraction level; few args; no flag/output args.
Command–Query Separation: commands change state and return void; queries return values without mutating.
Comments are last resort; delete noise/journals/commented-out code; keep consequence warnings and clarifying intent when the language truly can’t.
Names reveal intent; no noise words (data/info/manager); distinguish meaningfully.
Prefer red→green→refactor; tests are living documentation; do not ship untested behavior.
Dependencies point inward; frameworks/DB/web are details/plugins; protect structure over urgent hacks.
Prefer adding a type/class over hunting every switch/if for a new case.
